query:
SELECT pi.competenciaId, pi.notaAtual, pi.metaNota, c.nome 
FROM plano_individual pi
JOIN competencias c ON c.id = pi.competenciaId
WHERE pi.alunoId = 30097 AND c.nome LIKE '%Racioc%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT pi.competenciaId, pi.notaAtual, pi.metaNota, c.nome 
FROM plano_individual pi
JOIN competencias c ON c.id = pi.competenciaId
WHERE pi.alunoId = 30097 AND c.nome LIKE '%Racioc%';
